chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 39 of 2024 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 23.01.2024 Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Abro, Assistant Advocate General >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG Sindh has filed statements of Respondents No.3 to 8, which are taken on record. Copy whereof is supplied to Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate, who is holding brief on behalf of Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, learned counsel for the petitioner and under instructions does not press this Petition, which is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
